creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Sun Mar 30 18:01:21 2014
New Revision: 349656
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/349656
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r349656/

Log:
  - Update to 2.22
  - While I'm here, add missing dependency (devel/p5-Class-Load)
  
  Changes:	http://search.cpan.org/dist/Mason/Changes
  PR:		ports/188070
  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/www/p5-Mason/Makefile
  head/www/p5-Mason/distinfo

Modified: head/www/p5-Mason/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/p5-Mason/Makefile	Sun Mar 30 18:01:16 2014	(r349655)
+++ head/www/p5-Mason/Makefile	Sun Mar 30 18:01:21 2014	(r349656)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	Mason
-PORTVERSION=	2.20
+PORTVERSION=	2.22
 CATEGORIES=	www textproc perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	CPAN:JSWARTZ
@@ -15,6 +15,7 @@ LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
 LICENSE_COMB=	dual
 
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-Capture-Tiny>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Capture-Tiny \
+		p5-Class-Load>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Class-Load \
 		p5-Class-Unload>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Class-Unload \
 		p5-Devel-GlobalDestruction>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Devel-GlobalDestruction \
 		p5-Exception-Class>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Exception-Class \

==============================================================================
